programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Token is tired of being the only rich kid in town, and succeeds in attracting several other wealthy families to South Park.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Butters' Very Own Episode: Butters' mum asks him to spy on his dad, however what he discovers leaves Mrs Stoch acting slightly unhinged. Will this be the end of our lil blonde haired buddy? (S5, E14)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 514
programme.desc: Kenny Dies: When Kenny is diagnosed with a terminal illness, Stan takes it especially hard. Will Cartman's truck load of foetuses help with a cure? Or does he have other plans for them... (S5, E13)

programme.title: South Park S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the "Crips."

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: Toilet Paper: Mrs. Dreibel gives the boys detention for making a phallus out of clay in art class. Angry, they take revenge by toilet papering her house. Officer Barbrady is on their trail. (S7, E03)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: Cancelled: The boys get a sense of deja vu as Cartman again has an anal probe, but they soon realise they're actually stuck in some kind of re-run - Earth is just a reality show for aliens! (S7, E01)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: Fat Butt and Pancake Head: When Cartman wins a diversity event with his offensive hand puppet impersonation of Jennifer Lopez, Kyle is enraged. Soon the real J-Lo turns up, mightily peeved! (S7, E05)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Lil' Crime Stoppers: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny decide to play detective; they go around the town solving minor "crimes" for a dollar. It's not long before they're busting meth labs! (S7, E06)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: Red Man's Greed: When the entire town is bought out by a Native American casino, the boys come up with a plan to get their homes back - but is more gambling really the solution? (S7, E07)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: South Park is Gay! The TV show Queer Eye For The Straight Guy is sweeping the nation and the men of South Park are embracing metrosexuality, but what evil plan are the hosts plotting? (S7, E08)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: Christian Hard Rock: The boys form a band called Moop, but disagree on what direction they should take. Cartman leaves the band and bets them he will have a platinum record first! (S7, E09)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 14

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 16

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 17

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 20

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 23

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 24

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 1

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 4

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 5

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 6

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 9

programme.desc: Andy and Chris investigate a nightclub beating, but all clues point to a cop.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 16

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S5 Ep. 22
